case_title: GENO, JOHN A vs. DAY, RICHARD

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENO, JOHN A AS TO DEFENDANT DAY, RICHARD SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, RICHARD
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, RICHARD

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENO, JOHN A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-10-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

2:35 P.M. DEPT. #7, LELA A. HARRIS, PRO TEM, PATTY DOWLING REPORTER. C/C FOR SETTLMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL IN THE ALTERNATIVE. DEFT. TO PAY PAST DUE RENT OF $4,575.08 BY 6/3/93 TO PLAINTIFF; IF PAYMENT IN FULL RECEIVED BY SAID DATE, PLT. TO DIMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. IN THE ALTERNATIVE DEFT MAY ELECT TO VACATE THE PREMISE BY 6/3/93. IF THIS SECOND ALTERNATIVE IS CHOSEN, PLTF. TO WAIVE THE PAYMENT OF THE $4,575.08 IF DEFT IS OUT BY 6/3/93. SHOULD DEFT. FAIL TO VACATE TIMELY, PLTF. TO SEEK THE MONEY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT AND TO APPLY FOR A WRIT OF EVICTION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISE AFTER DEFT. VACATES DEEMED ABANDONED.
ADDED TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DISMISSAL CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
